maps.title: MAP: Be Bank of India (Rural
maps.objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be Bank of India (Rural
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be Bank of India (Rural'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Be Bank of India (Rural
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Bank of India (Rural
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Bank of India (Rural'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be Bank of India (Rural
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be Bank of India (Rural' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be Bank of India (Rural
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be Bank of India (Rural'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes: Review control description: The same shall be kept on record for audit purposes.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be for audit purposes
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be for audit purposes'. Required evidence types: Audit Report. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Audit Report
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be for audit purposes
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be for audit purposes' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be for audit purposes
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be for audit purposes'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

maps.title: MAP: Ensure no automatic increase in
maps.objective: To ensure ensure that there is no automatic increase in credit limit unless an explicit request is received, evaluated and kept on record from the borrower for

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Ensure no automatic increase in
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Ensure no automatic increase in'. Document the existing System Control posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: (2) A bank shall ensure that there is no automatic increase in credit limit unless an
explicit request is received, evaluated and kept on record from the borrower for
such increase.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Ensure no automatic increase in
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement technical controls to configure system to ensure that there is no automatic increase in credit limit unless an explicit request is received, evaluated and kept on record from the borrower for. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Configure system parameters: Ensure no automatic increase in
tasks.description: Apply specific configuration parameters for 'Ensure no automatic increase in'. Refer to applicable vendor documentation or Group Policy / Registry / OS settings for the exact parameter names and values required. Validate changes do not conflict with existing business configurations. Document pre-change and post-change configuration states.
tasks.expected_evidence: PowerShell output, Registry export, or system configuration dump
tasks.implementation_notes: Ensure rollback script is prepared prior to making changes.

tasks.title: Test and validate implementation: Ensure no automatic increase in
tasks.description: Execute functional and compliance testing to confirm that 'Ensure no automatic increase in' has been implemented correctly. Tests must cover positive scenarios (compliant behaviour is accepted) and negative scenarios (non-compliant behaviour is rejected). Record all test cases, inputs, outputs, and pass/fail results in a Test Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Test report PDF with test case results and system output evidence
tasks.implementation_notes: All tests must pass before proceeding to the next task.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Ensure no automatic increase in
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Ensure no automatic increase in'. Required evidence types: System Configuration Screenshot. tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Ensure no automatic increase in' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: The name of the lender(s) may or may not be disclosed as part of
disclosure under this provision.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Or disclosed as part of
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to or may not be disclosed as part of disclosure under this provision. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Or disclosed as part of
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Or disclosed as part of'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Or disclosed as part of
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Or disclosed as part of' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Or disclosed as part of
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Or disclosed as part of'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. tasks.title: Assess current state against: Put board-approved policy for assessment
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Put board-approved policy for assessment'. Document the existing Policy posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: Each bank shall put in place a board-approved policy for assessment of household
income.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Put board-approved policy for assessment
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Put board-approved policy for assessment'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Obtain Board/Management approval for policy: Put board-approved policy for assessment
tasks.description: Present the drafted policy for 'Put board-approved policy for assessment' to the Board or Senior Management for formal ratification. Record approval in the Board/Committee meeting minutes. Ensure the approved policy is version-controlled and stored in the policy repository.

tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: The bank shall have a board-approved policy to provide the flexibility of repayment
periodicity on microfinance loans as per borrowers' requirement.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Have to provide the flexibility
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Have to provide the flexibility'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Obtain Board/Management approval for policy: Have to provide the flexibility
tasks.description: Present the drafted policy for 'Have to provide the flexibility' to the Board or Senior Management for formal ratification. Record approval in the Board/Committee meeting minutes. Ensure the approved policy is version-controlled and stored in the policy repository.
tasks.expected_evidence: Board resolution or Committee minutes referencing policy approval
tasks.implementation_notes: Approval must be captured in formal minutes, not email.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Have to provide the flexibility
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Have to provide the flexibility'. Required evidence types: Approved Policy Document. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Approved Policy Document
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Have to provide the flexibility
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Have to provide the flexibility' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Policy Review. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Have to provide the flexibilit
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Have to provide the flexibility'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
